message:
docs(core): clarify benchmark comparison ratio semantics and fsync frequency comments

Update WritebackComparison doc comments to explicitly show the ratio
formulas: throughput_ratio = baseline_duration/writeback_duration,
latency ratios = writeback/baseline. Clarify fsync_every comment that
frequency applies to writes not total ops.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
